message:
test: align pool integration tests with updated try_get API

Update all test files that call DbPool::try_get to match the new return
type (Option<Guard> instead of Result<Option<Guard>>):
- database_pool_integration.rs: Ok(None) → None, Ok(Some(_)) → Some(_)
- e2e_t6_data_path.rs: Ok(None) → None, while let Ok(Some(c)) → while let Some(c)
- tokio_db_messaging_integration.rs: Ok(None) → None

Additional test fixes:
- io_uring_reactor.rs: remove unused mut on bind_ephemeral listener.
- pool_leak.rs: use Runtime::with_config instead of Runtime::new,
  use Cx::current() instead of Cx::background() to get a proper
  runtime task context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
